2026-04-16T07:49:56.7011954Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:56.7012363Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:56.7012707Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:56.7012997Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-16T07:49:56.7013223Z [36;1m[0m
